name: Dexter
best_contact_role: Alberto Calvo (Gerente General Grupo Dabra); marketing lead per LinkedIn
why_target: Argentina's leading multi-brand sports retailer since 1988; flagship channel for Adidas / Nike / Puma / Under Armour football boots and the AFA replica kit during the Messi farewell tour; Grupo Dabra is the dominant sports retail holding in the country
notes: HQ Autopista Panamericana KM 25,6 Don Torcuato, Buenos Aires. Phone 0810-888-3398. Part of Grupo Dabra (also owns Stock Center, Moov by Dexter, Netshoes, Tienda River, Tienda Pincha, Urbo, Lotto, 120+ stores total). CEO Alberto Calvo (ex Netshoes, ex Nike). Loyalty programme 'Tribu Dexter'.

name: Stock Center by Netshoes
why_target: Multi-marca chain merged with Netshoes e-commerce since 2020; carries the full Adidas AFA Argentina 2026 kit + Predator boots; sister chain to Dexter under Grupo Dabra so a single Grupo Dabra yes unlocks 120+ stores
notes: HQ Colectora Panamericana km 25,600. Operating entity Karias S.A. Stock Center. Merged commercial site with Netshoes (Brazilian e-commerce platform acquired 2019). Operates 24 physical stores plus Netshoes online channel.

name: Open Sports
regions: Buenos Aires, La Pampa, Rio Negro, Neuquen, Santa Fe (34 cities)
best_contact_role: Customer Service / Grupo Open Sports marketing
why_target: Grupo Open Sports is Argentina's most important sports retail chain by their own positioning; 80 stores across 5 provinces, 800+ employees, 64+ year trajectory; also operates Adidas, Crocs and Lacoste franchise stores so they directly run the Adidas Argentina retail counters
notes: Parent Grupo Open Sports also owns Trip Store, Run&Bike, Florida Premium Outlet, Rossi Rossi. Phone 0800-999-8638. Great Place to Work certified. WhatsApp via site. Most relevant single conversation in AR sports retail.

name: Sportline
why_target: Multi-brand zapatillas + indumentaria deportiva chain with stores across CABA + Greater Buenos Aires (Avellaneda, Belgrano, Florida, Moron, Quilmes, San Justo, Ezeiza, Moreno) plus interior; carries Nike/adidas/Puma football boots and AFA replicas
notes: Phone 11-5578-0529. Job applications busquedas@sportline.com.ar. National free shipping over ARS 149,999. Mid-tier price point so prediction-pool foot traffic angle resonates.

name: Showsport
why_target: Dominant sports chain in the Litoral / NEA region (Corrientes, Chaco, Misiones); 201-500 employees per LinkedIn; strong indigenous brand awareness in provinces ignored by Buenos Aires chains; carries Nike/adidas/Puma football boots and AFA kit
notes: HQ Corrientes Capital (Centenario Shopping). WhatsApp +54 9 3794 871753. Operates branded canalshowsport.com.ar for B2B. Often skipped by federal-capital outreach so a 'first to ask' advantage.

name: Solo Deportes
why_target: 30-store Argentine sportswear chain; high-traffic CABA locations (Florida 638, Cabildo 2070, Av. Rivadavia 6686 + 6581); carries adidas/Puma/Nike/New Balance/Reebok including the AFA 2026 kit
notes: Phone 0800-222-7656 (SOLO). WhatsApp +54 9 11 2348 8680. Monday-Friday 10-18; Saturday 10-16. Multi-brand model so flexible on partnership terms.

name: Moov by Dexter
regions: 22 provinces (Corrientes, Mendoza, San Juan, Salta, Tucuman, Santiago del Estero, Chaco, Cordoba, Entre Rios, Santa Fe, Buenos Aires +)
why_target: Urban + sportswear chain born inside Grupo Dabra; carries Nike, adidas, Puma, Under Armour, Jordan, Vans, Fila, Converse, Reebok; strong AFA Argentina kit positioning given Adidas relationship
notes: Same parent (Grupo Dabra) as Dexter and Stock Center so route via Dexter contact. Phone via Grupo Dabra 0810-888-3398. Anchor stores in Rosario (Cordoba pedestrian 1280, Alto Rosario Shopping) and Mendoza Shopping.

name: Mega Sports
why_target: Family-owned multi-brand chain since 1994; 35+ stores across AMBA; carries adidas/Nike/Puma plus AFA replica kit; free pickup at all branches
notes: Founded 1994 in Belgrano. Family-owned so faster decision making than Grupo Dabra. Free pickup available at all AMBA branches.

name: Sporting
why_target: Dominant sports retail chain in NOA (Northwest Argentina) where federal chains have thin presence; carries football boots and AFA kit; ideal partner for a province-level WC2026 pool
notes: NOA regional anchor. Also operates Woker By Sporting (wokerbysporting.com.ar) sub-brand.

name: NBA Store by AMI Group / Dash Deportes
regions: national (~85 points of sale incl. Dash + Grid + NBA Store)
best_contact_role: Daniel Franco (CEO AMI Group); Amilcar Torres (Presidente del Directorio)
why_target: AMI Group runs Dash + Grid + Mark Sports + the first official NBA Store in Argentina (Panamericana y Edison Martinez, opened April 2025); 40+ years in sports retail; basketball-led but Dash + Grid carry full Nike / adidas / Puma football inventory inc. AFA kit
notes: Holding entity AMI Group SA. Daniel Franco CEO (per LinkedIn). Amilcar Torres Presidente. Anchor location Av. Panamericana y Edison Martinez. NBA Store includes basketball court for shoe try-on + NBA Cafe.

name: Grid
regions: Buenos Aires, Cordoba, Mendoza, Salta, Chubut, Chaco
why_target: Urban + sports fashion chain owned by AMI Group; 20+ stores nationwide; official Nike, adidas, Puma reseller plus the NBA + AFA collaborations; strong appeal to the 18-30 demographic who'll drive WC2026 social shares
notes: AMI Group portfolio brand (sister to Dash + NBA Store). MercadoLibre + Hot Sale channel active.

name: Dash Deportes
why_target: AMI Group's flagship chain with 40+ year history; 70+ stores nationwide; full Nike + adidas + Puma + Under Armour + Jordan inventory including AFA kit; recently rebranded the Martinez flagship into the NBA Store
notes: Phone 0810-888-8639. Sister to Grid + Mark Sports + NBA Store under AMI Group. Same B2B contact path.

name: Mark Sports
why_target: AMI Group's high-performance sports sub-brand created 2017; CABA + Plaza Oeste presence; targets serious athletes who tend to be deeper football fans
notes: AMI Group sibling to Dash + Grid + NBA Store. Av. Panamericana 535 esq. Edison (CABA).

name: Sportotal
regions: Mendoza, San Juan, San Luis, Catamarca, Santiago del Estero (Cuyo + NOA)
why_target: Cuyo regional sports retail leader; multi-brand (adidas, Puma, New Balance, Topper, Reebok, Salomon, Fila, Saucony); strong Mendoza + San Juan footprint where federal chains are thin
notes: Phone +54 264 420-0274. MercadoLibre channel active. Self-positioned as the Cuyo category leader.

name: Vaypol
why_target: Self-described 'tienda deportiva lider en todo Cuyo'; 5 stores all in Mendoza Province incl. flagship San Martin 1390; free shipping province-wide; carries Nike/adidas/Puma plus AFA kit
notes: Phone +54 263 442-7845. Multiple Mendoza locations (San Martin 1042, 1390, 1447, 2776; Tropero Sosa 441 Maipu). Province-scale anchor.

name: Depormania
why_target: Mendoza retailer 21+ years; 3 strategic stores covering most departments of the province; carries adidas/Nike/Puma football kit including AFA Argentina
notes: HQ 9 de Julio 58, M5570 Mendoza. Phone +54 9 263 4598750. Smaller scale = faster turnaround on a free promo offer.

name: Newsport
why_target: Cordoba-anchored sports chain with key stores in Patio Olmos Shopping + Av. Fuerza Aerea + Duarte Quiroz; carries adidas/Nike/Puma boots; strong reach in Cordoba football catchment (Talleres + Belgrano + Instituto fans)
notes: Phone 0810-888-8639 (shared switchboard infra with Dash). Also operates Newsport Bikes sub-brand.

name: Newsport Bikes
why_target: Cycling-focused sub-brand under Newsport; small but deep customer relationships; football is secondary but the prediction-pool tool plays equally well for any sports retailer
notes: Sister brand to Newsport. Shared contact path.

name: Grimoldi
why_target: Argentine footwear giant since 1895 with 77+ stores nationwide; primarily Hush Puppies / Merrell / CAT / Timberland / Kickers / American Pie / Rockport so not a football boot retailer per se, but high-margin lifestyle channel that could run a brand-aligned WC pool
notes: HQ Castelar (factory there since 1955). 130+ year heritage. Listed here for breadth: Tournamental's universal-fit prediction tool works for any retailer with football-loving customers, not just specialists.

name: Camisetas Retro BA
why_target: Direct-to-consumer specialist in retro Argentina national-team jerseys (1978, 1982, 1986, 1994, 1999, 2002, 2006, 2022); ships worldwide; native customer base of Argentina football collectors = highest-intent WC2026 pool participants
notes: Phone +54 11 5028 0128. Located Villa Crespo, CABA. Instagram @camisetas.retro.ba.

name: Mundial Retro Camisetas
why_target: Specialist retro Argentina jersey e-tailer; full Mundial-themed inventory ahead of WC2026; offers Correo Argentino national shipping with free over ARS 90,000
notes: WhatsApp only (no calls) +54 9 11 6551 6507. Adrogue Buenos Aires. Free shipping threshold suggests AOV around ARS 90k.

name: La Camiseteria
why_target: Premium replica retro football shirts specialist; La Plata HQ; ships nationally; not affiliated with clubs or manufacturers so fully independent decision-making
notes: Email obfuscated on site (contact via WhatsApp). Active on TikTok / Instagram @lacamiseteriaretro.

name: Libero Camisetas
why_target: Retro + current football jersey e-tailer; offers up to 24 interest-free installments and free national shipping; full Liga Argentina + national team coverage; very Messi-marketing-friendly
notes: No published phone. Contact-form only. Strong pricing-led marketing message suits the free-prize-pool pitch.

name: AFA Shop
why_target: The sole official online store of the Argentine national football team; operated jointly with Adidas; sells authentic + fan versions of the WC2026 kit; defending world champions inventory; reaches every Argentine WC2026 buyer
notes: Trains at Lionel Andres Messi facility Ezeiza. Adidas Argentina is the technical partner. Highest possible prize prestige (official AFA kit). Note: federation may route via Adidas commercial.

name: Tienda Boca / BocaShop
why_target: Official Boca Juniors online store run by Club Atletico Boca Juniors Asociacion Civil; matchday stand at La Bombonera; ~25M social media following globally; Messi + Maradona = strongest brand pull during WC2026
notes: Legal address Brandsen 805 CABA. CUIT registered to Boca Juniors Asociacion Civil. Largest single-club fan base in Argentina.

name: Tienda River
why_target: Official River Plate online + matchday store at the Monumental (San Martin tribuna terrace); operated by Grupo Dabra under licence; second-largest club brand in Argentina
notes: Av. Figueroa Alcorta 7597, CABA. CUIT 30-63848573-3. Online store managed by Grupo Dabra (same group as Dexter / Stock Center / Moov).

name: Independiente Store
regions: Avellaneda HQ + Libertadores de America stadium + Boyaca
why_target: Independiente officially recovered the merchandising concession in 2023 (previously Torneos); club retains 30% revenue from official kit; 3 physical stores plus online (formerly Diablo Soy); Adidas / Puma kit deal
notes: Stores at Av. Mitre 470 Avellaneda HQ, Libertadores de America stadium, and Boyaca complex. Hours Mon-Fri 11-19, Sat 11-14. Online migrated from diablosoy.com to independientestore.com.ar.

name: Locademia (Racing Club)
regions: Avellaneda, Microcentro CABA, Villa del Parque
why_target: Official Racing Club store network with 3 physical locations; Avellaneda flagship + Microcentro + Villa del Parque; defending Copa Sudamericana champions so commercial moment is hot
notes: Avellaneda Av. Mitre 934 piso 1 (phone 4229-1336). Microcentro Lavalle 1650. Villa del Parque Nogoya 3061. WhatsApp +54 11 2486 7952.

name: Soy Cuervo (San Lorenzo)
regions: Av. La Plata HQ + Av. de Mayo 964 + national online
why_target: Sole official online store of San Lorenzo de Almagro; physical stores at Boedo HQ (Av. La Plata) and Av. de Mayo 964 (downtown CABA); strong loyal supporter base (Big-5 club); customer service Mon-Sat 8-20
notes: San Lorenzo Store at Av. La Plata + Av. de Mayo 964. Soy Cuervo soycuervo.com is e-comm channel. Chat, email and phone channels listed on site.

name: Pasion Bostera
why_target: Licensed Boca Juniors apparel e-tailer; ships Boca official products nationwide; semi-independent so faster sign-off than the BocaShop official channel
notes: Not the official BocaShop but a licensed reseller; useful parallel channel to reach the Boca fan base if the official shop is slow to respond.

name: Auriazul Estudiantes Tienda Pincha
why_target: Official Estudiantes de La Plata online store operated under Grupo Dabra; Estudiantes has a deep history (Verón family + 2024 Copa de la Liga winner); La Plata anchor
notes: Operated by Grupo Dabra so route via Dexter contact path. Estudiantes de La Plata is widely considered a 'Big-6' club in Argentine football.

name: Boca Shop Network Mundo Boca Shop
why_target: Licensed Boca Juniors merchandise reseller; smaller scale than BocaShop or Pasion Bostera but partner-minded; could pilot the prediction pool faster
notes: Independent Boca-licensed e-tailer. Useful as a Boca channel test if BocaShop is unresponsive.

name: DXT (DXTmania)
regions: Caballito CABA, Villa del Parque, Flores
why_target: Independent CABA sports retailer since 2006; 3 small stores Caballito + Villa del Parque + Flores; football focused inventory; family business so quick yes/no on partnerships
notes: Phone +54 11 6991 7297. Av. Rivadavia 5896 Caballito flagship. Independent so faster decision-making.

name: Factory Deportivo
why_target: Independent multi-brand sports retailer at Av. Cabildo 1950 Belgrano (CABA); MercadoLibre Tienda Oficial; full Puma + adidas + Nike inventory including AFA kit
notes: Av. Cabildo 1950 CABA. MercadoLibre channel under 'Factory Deportivo'. Independent scale.
